title: Unexpected behaviour of events edge triggered on register value

features.name: non-blocking assignment with conflicting values in posedge always block
features.description: Code should include a register receiving multiple non-blocking assignments in a posedge-triggered always block, where the first assignment conflicts with a conditional second assignment

features.name: register used as clock driven by posedge always block with NBA
features.description: Code should include a register assigned via non-blocking assignment in an edge-triggered always block and then used as a clock signal for other modules
